description_long: This is a wooden easel with a sturdy, dark brown frame and a rectangular support structure. The easel holds a large, flat canvas or board, which features a watercolor painting of green trees and a grassy landscape on its front side. The back of the canvas displays a faint upward-pointing arrow, possibly for orientation or instructional purposes. The easel's legs are angled outward for stability, and a horizontal support bar runs across the lower section to hold the canvas in place. The wood appears to be smooth and well-finished, giving the easel a professional and durable appearance. There are no visible adjustable mechanisms, but the design suggests it is suitable for outdoor or park use in urban environments.
description: A dark wooden easel with angled legs supports a large canvas featuring a watercolor landscape of trees. The structure is sturdy, with a smooth finish and a horizontal support bar for the canvas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angled legs and the thin profile of the canvas and support bar.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing the back of the canvas with a faint arrow and the full support structure of the easel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the angled legs and the edge of the canvas.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the watercolor painting of trees and the horizontal support bar holding the canvas.
